name: Venty Wear & Tear Set
summary: Enhance the longevity of your Venty vaporiser with the Wear & Tear Set.
description: Enhance the longevity of your Venty vaporiser with the Wear & Tear Set. This all-inclusive package features mouthpieces, a cooling unit, screens, filling chamber tools, and a cleaning brush for a thorough rejuvenation of your device. Designed for use specifically with the Venty Vaporiser. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
